items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond EVs
items.snippet: Albemarle CCO Eric Norris: grid energy storage evenly distributed globally, very interesting demand driver. ESS demand steady vs EV irregularity.

items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: Thursday: ALB down over 4%, SQM down 3%, SGML down over 2%, LAR down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Citi upgrades Albemarle to Buy - underappreciated growth opportunities ahead
items.snippet: Citi raised ALB to Buy. Target price $225. Structural lithium demand tailwinds. Market underestimating long-term growth. Unlikely glut scenario.

items.headline: Albemarle Q1 2026: volume up 14% YoY, ESS production +117% YoY
items.snippet: ALB Energy Storage volumes +14% YoY Q1 2026. ESS production global up 117% YoY. Lithium demand CAGR 10-20% 2025-2030.

items.headline: RBC raises Albemarle PT to $257, reiterated Outperform
items.snippet: RBC expects 2026 EBITDA $2.8B, 2027 $2.9B. Lithium supply tight through 2027. Market balanced to undersupplied through 2050.
